findings.evidence: `ComoduleCat` is declared with `variable (R : Type u) [CommSemiring R]` in `TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:42`, `ComoduleCat.of` takes `[AddCommMonoid M]` at `ComoduleCat.lean:65`, `Comodule.Hom` is semiring-level at `Comodule.lean:104`, and Mathlib has semiring-level `Module.Finite` lemmas such as `Module.Finite.of_basis` in `Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/FreeModule/Finite/Basic.lean:39`.
findings.fix: Define the object property, full subcategory, coercions, `Module.Finite` instance, `of`, and `ofHom` in a `[CommSemiring R]` section; keep only the inherited `AddCommGroup`/preadditive conveniences in a separate `[CommRing R]` section if needed.
findings.issue: `ComoduleCat.isFinite` and `FiniteComoduleCat` require `[CommRing R]`, but the ambient `ComoduleCat` and `Comodule.Hom` are defined over `[CommSemiring R]`.

findings.evidence: `Finite.lean:95` and `Finite.lean:116` require `[AddCommGroup]`, while the wrapped signatures are `[AddCommMonoid M] ...` in `ComoduleCat.of` at `ComoduleCat.lean:65` and `ComoduleCat.ofHom` at `ComoduleCat.lean:120`.
findings.fix: Change these constructor and simp lemma hypotheses to `[AddCommMonoid M]` and `[AddCommMonoid N]`, matching `ComoduleCat.of`/`ComoduleCat.ofHom`; additive groups can be derived separately when `R` is a ring.
findings.issue: `FiniteComoduleCat.of`, `of_obj`, `of_coact`, `ofHom`, and their simp lemmas require `[AddCommGroup]` on the source modules, although the unbundled comodule and morphism APIs they wrap only require `[AddCommMonoid]`.

summary: The finite-comodule API is stated one level too restrictively: the full subcategory and its basic constructors only need the semiring-level comodule infrastructure already present in TauCeti.
